response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for this role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level aptitude, but the absence of proven work with routing tiles, real-time traffic integration, or Linux-based high-performance geospatial pipelines raises significant gaps.
strengths: Built open-source GIS platform with real-world usage (Green Map)
Demonstrated systems-level programming with DLang and low-latency apps
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No evidence of C++ or Rust in commercial routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks demonstrated experience with routing tile generation or navigation data systems
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not aligned with C++ primary requirement
